extraction.one_line_summary: HIRT Jan attacked with under 8km to go on Valle Santa Cristina, catching breakaway KÄMNA Lennard to win after ARENSMAN Thymen bridged but couldn't sustain the pace.
tactical_patterns: BAHRAIN Victorious paced hard before final climb, allowing KÄMNA to attack early rather than protecting BILBAO/LANDA.
HINDLEY Jai gained bonus seconds in photo finish with pink jersey group, converting defensive riding into GC gains.
LANDA/BILBAO touched wheels while teammates in break, revealing coordination breakdown when multiple captains attack simultaneously.
NIBALI Vincenzo attacked Mortirolo when POZZOVIVO crashed, testing rivals' willingness to chase rather than committing fully.

rider_signals.HIRT Jan: positive: attacked from chasing group with 8km remaining, caught solo leader KÄMNA, showing superior final climb timing
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: bridged 40-second gap to breakaway at age 22, finished second despite being caught and passed
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: neutral: held 51-second advantage onto final climb but lacked reserves when caught with 8km left
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: followed LANDA attack then contested bonus sprint in pink jersey group, gaining 4 seconds tactically
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: negative: lost 15 seconds to main GC group on final climb, suggesting form crack compared to Mortirolo pacing
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: solo attack on Mortirolo gained nothing when no one followed, losing nearly minute overall
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: braking problems caused crash on Mortirolo descent, eliminated from GC contention
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: strong positioning in early breakaway groups on Mortirolo, better form than GC position suggests
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: mechanical issue required massive chase effort to rejoin before penultimate climb, wasting energy protecting CARAPAZ
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: negative: crashed with LANDA after wheel touch while both were teammates attacking, tactical confusion
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: attacked after BILBAO crash but CARAPAS and HINDLEY followed easily, gaining nothing from teammate sacrifice
